MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2003 Off Calendar

Dpu Scd 218 At 9:00 Am. On June 10, 2003
Off Calendar Jun-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: LDavid Davenport.
Appearances:
Richard J. Collier, Esq. for Plaintiff Peter Chan,
Witness: John Kao, Business Attorney was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Peter Chan and against the defendant Kwok Hei Ching.
Principal of $867,074.02
Attorney fees and costs of $15,000.00
For the total of $882,074.54
All other defendants to be dismissed.
Judgment signed in open court.
